name: KR Crypto Intelligence
description: Korean data API for AI agents. 15 paid endpoints: 11 crypto (Kimchi Premium, exchange intelligence, AI-translated Korean sentiment, divergence analysis, arbitrage scanning across 189+ tokens) + 4 Korean news → English (K-pop artists, semiconductor industry with AI sentiment analysis). x402 native on Base, Polygon, and Solana. AWS Bedrock AgentCore-ready.
